Package space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc

Interface SimpleJdbcPool.ConnectionWrapperFactory

Enclosing interface:
SimpleJdbcPool
public static interface SimpleJdbcPool.ConnectionWrapperFactory
Factory interface for wrapping original database connection.

This interface is typically used to wrap the underlying database connection with additional pooling behavior.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nonnull Connection
    wrap(@Nonnull Connection origin, @Nonnull SimplePool<Connection> pool)
    Wraps the original database connection with additional pooling behavior.

  • Method Details

    • wrap

      @Nonnull @Nonnull Connection wrap(@Nonnull @Nonnull Connection origin, @Nonnull @Nonnull SimplePool<Connection> pool) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Wraps the original database connection with additional pooling behavior.
      Parameters:
      origin - the original database connection
      pool - the connection pool for the original connection
      Returns:
      the wrapped connection
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if failed to wrap
